description.en:
This mod creates an additional yearly P&L Balance Sheet in addition to the standard monthly cashflow overview.
It shows proft & loss blocks for the current fiscal year, as well as the previous 4 fiscal years. A fiscal year ranges from January to December of a year.
It displays aggregated profit & loss statements for the following income and expense types:
BLOCK I: OPERATIONS - 1.1 income from sold products - 1.2 income from contract work - 1.3 expenses from operations: buying seeds, fertilizer, water, fuel, products, raw materials, distribution cost, repair and maintenance costs - 1.4 SUBTOTAL profit/loss from operations
BLOCK II: FINANCING - 2.1 income from financing activities (loans) - 2.2 expenses from financing activites (loan interest, loas repayments) - 2.3 other income/expenses - 2.4 SUBTOTAL profit/loss from financing
BLOCK III: INVESTING: - 3.1 income from selling land, equipment, buildings - 3.2 expenses from buying land, equipment, buildings - 3.3 SUBTOTAL profit/loss from investing
GRAND TOTAL P&L FROM BLOCKS I+II+III for discal period
